subject: Astronomy & Space
title: Is the Universe Flat?
description: A 60-second lesson on Is the Universe Flat?.

hook.text: The universe could be curved like a sphere, saddle-shaped, or perfectly flat. Measurements say it's flat.

buildup.text: The shape depends on total energy density. Too much curves it closed, too little opens it, just right means flat.

discovery.text: CMB measurements by WMAP and Planck show the universe is flat to within 0.4%. An astonishing level of balance.

twist.text: A flat universe means it will expand forever. No Big Crunch—just endless, accelerating expansion.

climax.text: Why is it so precisely flat? Inflation provides the best answer—it stretched any curvature to near zero.

punchline.text: Flat to within 0.4%. The universe balances on a knife's edge.

quiz.question: What evidence shows the universe is flat?
options: CMB measurements show the geometry is flat to within 0.4% precision
Galaxies are evenly distributed in every direction
Light travels in straight lines across the cosmos
